readme.current_age: Simulation start age. Set to 'compute' to derive automatically from birth_year (and optionally birth_month + birth_day). Year 1 = this age + 1.
readme.birth_year: Used to determine SECURE 2.0 RMD start age: born 1950 or earlier = age 72, born 1951-1959 = age 73, born 1960 or later = age 75.
readme.assumed_death_age: Last simulation year. Simulation runs from current_age+1 to this age inclusive.
readme.filing_status: Options: 'MFJ' (married filing jointly), 'single', 'MFS' (married filing separately), 'HOH' (head of household).
readme.spouse: Optional. Include only if filing_status is MFJ. sole_beneficiary_for_ira: true enables spousal rollover RMD rules.

beneficiaries.primary: First to inherit. share_percent values must sum to 100.
beneficiaries.contingent: Inherit only if all primary beneficiaries predecease. share_percent must sum to 100.
beneficiaries.eligible_designated_beneficiary: true = can use own life expectancy for inherited IRA RMDs. false = 10-year rule applies.
beneficiaries.per_stirpes: true = if this beneficiary predeceases, their share passes to their descendants.
beneficiaries.estimated_income_fields: estimated_income_moderate and estimated_income_high: heir's income for Roth optimizer BETR scenario modeling.

rmd_policy.extra_handling_options: What to do with RMD amounts above living expenses. 'reinvest_in_brokerage' = park surplus in taxable brokerage. 'spend' = treat as extra spending.

roth_conversion_policy.enabled: true/false. Master switch for all Roth conversions.
roth_conversion_policy.window_years: Year ranges when conversions are allowed. E.g. ['now-75', '1-10']. 'now' = current_age.
roth_conversion_policy.keepit_below_max_marginal_fed_rate_optio: 'fill the bracket' = fill to top of current bracket. A rate string like '22%' = stop before hitting that rate. 'none' = no cap.
roth_conversion_policy.avoid_niit: true = halt conversion if it would push investment income above the $250K NIIT threshold.
roth_conversion_policy.rmd_assist_options: 'convert' = count pending RMD toward Roth conversion room. 'none' = independent.
roth_conversion_policy.tax_payment_source_options: 'BROKERAGE' = pay conversion tax from brokerage. 'withhold' = deduct from conversion amount.
roth_conversion_policy.irmaa_guard: enabled: true = cap conversion to avoid crossing an IRMAA Medicare premium tier (relevant ages 65+).

readme.state: Resident state for state income tax. Must match a state key in taxes_states_mfj_single.json exactly (e.g. 'California', 'New York', 'Texas').
readme.rmd_table: IRS RMD table. Options: 'uniform_lifetime' (default), 'joint_survivor' (spouse sole beneficiary AND >10yr younger).
readme.target_age: Final simulation age. n_years = target_age - current_age. Range: 10-60 years.
readme.retirement_age: Target retirement age. Used for Roth conversion window planning and simulation mode blending.

roth_optimizer_config.include_survivor_scenario: true = model single-filer bracket cliff when spouse predeceases.
roth_optimizer_config.include_heir_scenario: true = model 10-year forced liquidation for non-spouse heirs (SECURE Act 2.0).
roth_optimizer_config.irmaa_sensitivity: low = IRMAA flagged but does not tip recommendation. high = IRMAA treated as near-hard constraint.
roth_optimizer_config.window_years: Override for conversion window length. Defaults to min(29, 75 - current_age).

social_security.self_benefit_monthly: Gross monthly SS benefit at full retirement age (FRA).
social_security.spouse_benefit_monthly: Spouse gross monthly SS benefit at their FRA.
social_security.exclude_from_plan: true = zero out SS entirely. Tests portfolio-only sufficiency.
